title: Mercenary Park Vanilla Plus
description: A modpack that adds mostly quality of life & performance related stuff. It's meant to make the vanilla experience less frustrating for a group of friends
body:
The vanilla + modpack I'm making for a group of friends, but you can also use this as well.

# Direction
- This modpack doesn't aim to add a bunch of new features to the game, but instead improve the gameplay experience of vanilla without being too overwhelming
- This isn't quite as lightweight as other QoL modpacks but kind of aims to be in-between something like "fabulously optimized" and "Better Minecraft"
- Very light on "new" content in favor of reworks and changes to existing content

# What does this add?
- This modpack acts as a more curated version of other "vanilla+" modpacks. This means mostly quality of life changes while still being light on "new content".
- You'll find a lot of essential mods like "iris" and "sodium" and stuff like that
- I also added some gameplay changing ones like Easy Magic & Vein Miner
- The most this modpack deviates from Vanilla are with stuff like "Tom's Simple Storage" which was added to help remove some tedium.
- This modpack is inspired by modpacks like "Better Minecraft" and "Fabulously Optimized", but also with many suggestions from people I play with.

# Single Player or Server?
- This modpack is designed for a multiplayer server, but you can play it single player as well.

# Updates?
- You can expect this modpack to be updated over time, but not at the speed of professional modpack creators

# Modlist
- If you want to look at the modlist, click Versions -> Click on a Version -> Dependencies
